behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the commands (install-browser, install-skills), capability types (network), file behaviors (.claude/skills/playwright/), and literal strings required in docs; tests check these same items.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (rename command, add capability) without specifying line numbers or exact code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use regex to find command names and capabilities, allowing flexible implementations; installSkills check allows cp/cpSync variants.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run npm build, tsc, and actually execute install-skills via spawn to verify file copying behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_install_skills_executes actually runs the CLI and checks destination directory; stub wouldn't copy files.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction-required behaviors (rename, install-skills, network capability, doc strings) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with clear section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Config/documentation) and tagged with [static]/[pr_diff]/[repo_tests].

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction describes modules by purpose, doesn't specify exact file/line locations of bugs.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code task, not agentmd-edits config task.
